name: Beautiful gold colored bridal jewelry set with red teardrop stones and sparkling white stones
description:
Elevate your bridal and festive look with this magnificent choker necklace and earring set from Srishringarr, a masterpiece of regal design and timeless elegance. Exquisitely crafted with gleaming gold-toned metal, the set features a breathtaking tapestry of brilliant white stones and rich ruby-red gems arranged in a striking floral-leaf motif. The cascading silhouette of the choker draws the eye with its intricate craftsmanship, making it the perfect statement piece for grand weddings, receptions, and sangeet celebrations. Complete with matching chandelier earrings, this set promises to envelop you in an aura of majestic sophistication and unforgettable glamour.

Key Features:
• Exquisite Craftsmanship: Features intricate, openwork gold-toned metal detailing adorned with shimmering pave-set white crystals and premium synthetic ruby stones.
• Regal Design Motif: Designed with a structured choker collar that flows into a majestic, cascading central pendant showcasing a striking teardrop ruby focal point.
• Matching Statement Earrings: Includes a pair of coordinating dangle earrings that beautifully mirror the leafy design, finished with delicate teardrop ruby drops.
• Adjustable Fit: The necklace is equipped with an adjustable gold-threaded drawstring dori to ensure a customized and comfortable fit around the neckline.
• Occasion Wear: Ideal for brides, bridesmaids, and high-profile festive events such as weddings, receptions, and sangeets, pairing effortlessly with luxurious lehengas and sarees.

Heavy gold plated necklace set with shiny white stones and green and red drops for festive wear
description:
Elevate your festive and bridal elegance with this magnificent gold-plated kundan necklace set from Srishringarr, a masterpiece designed to capture the essence of royal Indian heritage. The choker-style necklace features a spectacular bib design adorned with shimmering polki-cut stones, structured square motifs with rich red and green stone inlays, and multi-layered gold beaded strands that drape gracefully around the neckline. Cascading emerald-green and ruby-red bead droplets dance along the lower border, adding a vibrant contrast and dynamic movement to this opulent ensemble. Perfect for grand weddings, lavish receptions, or high-spirited sangeet nights, this statement set comes complete with matching jhumka earrings that promise to crown your traditional attire with unmatched sophistication.

Key Features:
• Design Artistry: Exquisite bib-style choker necklace showcasing brilliant polki-style kundan settings and traditional gold-tone metal engraving.
• Regal Color Palette: Embellished with vibrant red and green square center stone accents, complemented by cascading green and red tumble bead drops.
• Multi-Strand Elegance: Suspended from luxurious multi-layered strands of gold beads interspersed with delicate red and green spacer beads.
• Exquisite Jhumka Earrings: Coordinated bell-shaped hanging earrings featuring matching square motifs, floral filigree studs, and delicate seed pearl fringe detailing.
• Premium Craftsmanship: Crafted with high-grade alloy, premium gold-plated finishing, selected faux stones, and polished bead dangles.
• Custom Fit: Equipped with an adjustable gold cord drawstring at the back to comfortably fit different neck sizes

name: Exquisite Pastel Blue Handcrafted Georgette Lehenga
description:
Evoke a sense of ethereal luxury with this breathtaking ice-blue lehenga choli set from Srishringarr, a masterpiece designed to captivate at first glance. Crafted with unmatched precision, the ensemble features intricate silver and white embroidery, shimmering sequins, and delicate threadwork that gracefully flows across a premium fabric base. This regal creation boasts a meticulously designed blouse with modern structural details and a voluminous, heavily embroidered skirt finished with an elegant scalloped hemline. Perfectly suited for grand weddings, reception soirées, or high-glamour sangeets, this ensemble promises an aura of timeless sophistication and mesmerizing grace for the modern bride or connoisseur of luxury fashion.

Key Features:

• Exquisite Color Palette: An ethereal ice-blue shade infused with shimmering silver and pristine white details for a sophisticated, modern-royal look.
• Choli and Blouse: A sleeveless silhouette featuring a structured cross-over design, meticulously hand-embroidered with fine sequins and dense threadwork.
• Majestic Lehenga Skirt: A floor-sweeping A-line skirt showcasing layered architectural motifs, delicate floral vine patterns, and a dramatic scalloped hemline that catches the light beautifully.
• Sheer Net Dupatta: A delicate, lightweight dupatta adorned with scattered silver floral bootis and finished with an exquisitely embroidered border matching the lehenga.
• Premium Craftsmanship: Masterfully crafted embroidery combining traditional artistry with contemporary aesthetics, ensuring a luxurious texture and brilliant dimension under evening lights.
• Versatile Occasion Wear: An exceptional choice for brides, bridesmaids, or esteemed guests looking to make a memorable statement at weddings, sangeets, and formal receptions.

name: Blush Pink Scalloped Border Luxury Lehenga
description:
Embrace ethereal royalty with this breathtaking dusty rose lehenga choli, a masterpiece of haute couture designed by Srishringarr for the modern bride or high-fashion connoisseur. Intricately adorned with vertical streams of shimmering silver sequins, crystals, and delicate metallic embroidery, this ensemble casts a mesmerizing glow with every movement. The voluminous, floor-sweeping skirt is beautifully complemented by a heavily embellished, long-sleeved choli and a sheer matching dupatta, making it the ultimate statement piece for grand weddings, receptions, or sangeet celebrations.

Key Features:
• Elegant Colorway: Crafted in a sophisticated dusty rose pink shade, offering a modern yet timeless appeal for evening celebrations.
• Exquisite Blouse: Features a structured V-neckline, full-length sleeves, and a delicately scalloped hemline adorned with hanging bead details, fully hand-embellished with sequins and fine zari work.
• Opulent Lehenga Skirt: Designed with mesmerizing vertical linear sequin patterns that create a statuesque silhouette, culminating in a majestic, heavily embroidered scalloped border at the hem.
• Sheer Dupatta: A lightweight net dupatta featuring a matching, intricately embroidered border and delicate floral buttis scattered throughout for an ethereal drape.
• Artisan Craftsmanship: Handcrafted with premium metallic threads, glistening glass beads, and light-catching sequins that create a multidimensional shimmering effect.

name: Teal Botanical Indo-Western Cape Lehenga Set
description:
Bring a vibrant, contemporary elegance to your festive wardrobe with this stunning teal floral lehenga set. Perfectly blending traditional embellishments with a modern, breezy silhouette, this ensemble is the ultimate statement piece for a Mehendi, Sangeet, or destination resort wedding.

Key Features:

The Blouse (Choli): A tailored teal crop top adorned with dense, multi-colored floral embroidery and intricate beadwork. The standout feature is the beautifully scalloped hemline, finished with delicate, sparkling crystal-bead fringes that move gracefully with you.

The Lehenga (Skirt): A voluminous, flared skirt featuring a lively, all-over botanical print in vibrant shades of mustard yellow, powder blue, green, and blush pink. It is secured by a heavily embroidered waistband and detailed with playful fabric tassels (latkans) cascading down the side.

The Cape: A modern alternative to the traditional dupatta, this flowy, matching floral cape drapes effortlessly over the shoulders. It is framed by a heavy, scalloped embroidered border and finished with vibrant yellow tassel accents along the edge.

Color Palette: A rich teal base brought to life with a vivid, multi-hued garden motif.

name: Metallic Rose Embroidered Tulle Lehenga Choli
description:
Exude modern romance and timeless grandeur with this breathtaking dusty rose lehenga set from Srishringarr, meticulously designed to make a captivating statement. The ensemble is defined by its dazzling all-over sequin embroidery, arranged in intricate chevron and vertical patterns that catch the light beautifully with every turn. Featuring an alluring backless choli with elegant long sleeves and a dramatic tie-back bow, this masterpiece seamlessly fuses contemporary allure with classic Indian craftsmanship. It is the quintessential choice for high-glamour celebrations, from enchanting sangeet nights to opulent wedding receptions.

Key Features:
• Silhouette and Design: A striking, modern-traditional lehenga choli set designed to accentuate the feminine form with an elegant A-line flare and a bold, dramatic back.
• Exquisite Embellishment: Heavily adorned with linear and geometric chevron sequin embroidery that creates a luxurious, shimmering texture across the entire garment.
• Couture Choli: Features a sophisticated backless design, elegant full-length sleeves, and a statement-making oversized bow tie-back that adds a touch of playful romance.
• Lehenga Skirt: A voluminous, flowing panelled skirt finished with a beautifully structured, embellished hemline for an effortless glide.
• Sheer Dupatta: Crafted from delicate, lightweight net, featuring scattered sequin accents and a finished embroidered border that drapes gracefully.
• Ideal Occasions: Perfectly suited for modern brides, bridesmaids, or guests attending grand weddings, sangeet ceremonies, receptions, and luxury soirées.

name: Enchanting Lilac Floral Embroidered Lehenga with Beaded Fringe
description:
Make a sophisticated statement at your next festive occasion, bridesmaid duty, or evening reception with this breathtaking non-bridal lehenga set. Combining soft pastel hues with exquisite detailing, this ensemble offers a perfect blend of modern silhouettes and traditional craftsmanship.

Key Features:

Color Profile: A delicate pastel lilac base, beautifully offset by a refreshing pale chartreuse (light green) dupatta for a modern color-blocking effect.

The Blouse (Choli): A contemporary masterpiece featuring a classic sweetheart neckline and elegant cap sleeves. It is richly adorned with multi-colored floral embroidery and finished with striking crystal-bead fringes along the hem and sleeves. The reverse reveals a stunning corset-style criss-cross tie-up back, ensuring a customizable and flattering fit.

The Lehenga (Skirt): A voluminous, flared skirt cascading with intricate, all-over floral embroidery in soft shades of pink, blue, yellow, and shimmering silver sequins. The skirt is anchored by a heavily detailed, scalloped hemline that adds a touch of regal elegance to your movement.

The Dupatta: A lightweight, sheer net dupatta in a contrasting soft green, framed by a matching silver and lilac embroidered border to complete the look effortlessly.

Style Tip:
Complement the pastel tones and elegant neckline with a statement Polki or emerald choker, and style your hair in soft, loose waves for a truly romantic and contemporary look.

name: Pastel Aqua Green Geometric Silver Embroidered Lehenga Choli with Full Sleeves
description:
Make a spectacular entrance at your next festive occasion with our Pastel Aqua Green Embroidered Lehenga Choli. Perfect for sangeet nights, receptions, and bridesmaids, this contemporary non-bridal lehenga blends modern symmetry with traditional glamour.

The voluminous skirt is richly detailed with heavy silver sequin and zari embroidery, intricately laid out in an eye-catching geometric diamond and chevron pattern. The matching blouse features elegant full-length sleeves, a flattering sweetheart neckline, and a stunning scalloped hemline finished with delicate beaded drops. A sheer net dupatta with scattered floral motifs and a coordinating silver border completes this majestic pastel ensemble.

Product Highlights:

Work & Embellishments: Exquisite silver sequins and zari work in a modern geometric diamond layout.

Blouse Style: Full-sleeved with a sweetheart neckline and beaded tassel hem.

Dupatta: Lightweight sheer net with scattered silver floral bootis and embellished borders.

Occasion: Sangeet, reception, engagement, or wedding guest attire.

name: Champagne Gold Geometric Embellished Lehenga Choli with Sequins and Sheer Dupatta
description:
Exude modern elegance with our Designer Champagne Gold Embellished Lehenga Choli, a magnificent contemporary ensemble perfectly crafted for engagements, receptions, and glamorous evening soirées.

This striking non-bridal lehenga features a sophisticated metallic champagne gold hue, fully adorned with intricate, light-catching embellishments. The sweeping skirt is designed with striking vertical chevron and geometric sequin patterns that beautifully elongate the silhouette and culminate in a heavily detailed hem.

The matching sleeveless choli (blouse) boasts a flattering, structured sweetheart-style neckline on the front. Turning around, the back of the blouse reveals an elegant sheer panel decorated with scattered diamond-shaped motifs and a classic scoop cut. A lightweight, sheer net dupatta featuring a matching embellished border and delicate linear detailing completes this ethereal look.

Work & Embellishments: Heavy all-over sequin and bead embroidery laid out in a modern, vertical geometric and chevron pattern.

name: Royal Vermilion Hand-Embroidered Kalidar Bridal Lehenga Choli with Sheer Tulle Dupatta
description:
Embody the ultimate aura of a modern-day Maharani on your big day with this breathtaking Crimson Silk Heritage Bridal Lehenga Choli. Designed for the bride who wants a masterful blend of centuries-old craftsmanship and a striking contemporary silhouette, this ensemble is an absolute showstopper.

The Craftsmanship & Design Details
The Kalidar Lehenga Skirt: Crafted from the finest vermilion red silk, the skirt features a dramatic, heavy flare composed of structured kalis (panels). It is densely adorned with traditional Zardozi, intricate Zari, and delicate Tilla embroidery, weaving together magnificent Mughal-inspired architectural arches and flowing floral motifs that catch the light beautifully.

The Statement Choli: A meticulously tailored blouse featuring a timeless sweetheart neckline and ornate all-over floral embroidery. The back features a stunning, modern keyhole cutout design, held together by delicate dori ties and heavy, handcrafted statement fabric tassels for a picture-perfect exit.

The Sheer Tulle Dupatta: A lightweight, translucent matching red tulle dupatta designed to drape elegantly without weighing you down. It is framed by a rich, heavily embroidered border that perfectly mirrors the lehenga's hemline, finished with scattered floral buttis across the body.

Style & Fit Notes
Styling Tip: Maximize the regal vibe of the sweetheart neck and deep crimson fabric by pairing it with a heavy Polki or uncut diamond choker accented with emerald or mint-green drop beads. Secure the sheer dupatta on your head to create a royal veil effect, or drape it fluidly over one shoulder to highlight the intricate back design.

Specifications
Color: Vermilion Red / Deep Crimson

Fabric: Premium Raw Silk (Lehenga Skirt & Blouse), Luxury Sheer Tulle (Dupatta)

Embroidery Techniques: Handcrafted Zardozi, Metallic Zari, Fine Tilla, and Resham thread work

Neckline: Embroidered Sweetheart Neck

Sleeve Detail: Half sleeves with dense border work

Blouse Back: Couture Keyhole cut with adjustable Dori and heavy handcrafted tassels

Set Components: 1 Fully Flared Lehenga Skirt, 1 Blouse Fabric/Piece, 1 Embellished Dupatta

name: Modern navy blue high neck gown with stylish vertical lines and front pleated details
description:
Elevate your evening wear collection with this striking Prussian blue gown from Srishringarr, a masterpiece of contemporary design and understated luxury. Crafted from a premium textured fabric featuring fine vertical ribbing, this gown beautifully marries minimalist sophistication with architectural drama. The sleek halter neckline with a subtle keyhole cutout is balanced by a spectacularly draped, pleated skirt that cascades into sculptural ruffles, creating a mesmerizing silhouette with every movement. Perfect for modern receptions, high-fashion sangeet ceremonies, or elite cocktail galas, this gown promises to make an unforgettable style statement.

Key Features:

• Silhouette: An elegant A-line floor-length gown featuring a fitted halter bodice and a dramatically draped skirt.
• Neckline Details: A sophisticated high halter neck accented with a delicate keyhole cutout at the center chest, highlighting the shoulders and collarbone.
• Premium Fabric: Engineered from a high-quality textured fabric with fine vertical ribbing that adds subtle dimension and luxurious tactile appeal.
• Sculptural Draping: Features structured, origami-inspired pleats and cascading front ruffles that elevate the gown's contemporary aesthetic.
• Styling Versatility: Ideal for receptions, cocktail parties, and modern pre-wedding festivities; pair with statement drop earrings and a sleek updo to accentuate the halter neckline.
